case_title: INDUSTRIAL INDEMNITY FINANCIAL CORPORATION vs. HOFFMAN, GARY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INDUSTRIAL INDEMNITY FINANCIAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, GARY $19,472.98 PRINCIPAL, $19,330.62 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38,817.60 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
